markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content strategy, review artifacts, and finalize blog topics.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy:** The initial strategy will mirror competitor Jamf to quickly close keyword gaps. This will be supplemented by Brock's product-led topics to highlight Fleet's unique advantages.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [**Tone & Voice:** Brock will provide more technical articles to refine the AI's output. The goal is a direct, logical "Spock-like" tone, avoiding the "froth" of business jargon.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [**"Linux MDM" Messaging:** The team will use a nuanced approach for the "Linux MDM" keyword. This strategy captures search traffic while maintaining authority by explaining that a formal MDM specification for Linux doesn't exist.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [**Artifact Review:** Brock requires direct Slack links to specific Notion documents needing his review to ensure timely feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Topic Generation

  - [**Initial Strategy:** Mirror competitor Jamf to quickly close keyword gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
      - [**Method:** Aida used keyword gap analysis to identify topics Jamf covers but Fleet does not.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [**Brock's Feedback:** This approach risks missing Fleet's unique advantages over Jamf.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1301.0)
      - [**Example:** Fleet's cross-platform policies vs. Jamf's single-platform extension attributes.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [**Decision:** Combine both approaches.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**Action:** Brock will provide a list of \~50 product-led topics.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This ensures coverage of both competitive parity and unique features.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

### Tone & Voice Refinement

  - [**Goal:** Refine the AI's output to match Fleet's desired voice.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [**Initial Test:** An AI analysis of the Stripe case study flagged some jargon.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [**Context:** The article was a rushed rewrite of a jargon-filled original, explaining the AI's flags.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [**Brock's Guidance:** The desired tone is direct and logical ("Spock-like"), not "frothy" or overly conversational.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
      - [**Action:** Brock will provide more technical articles as better examples.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
      - [**Note:** The "case study on Fleet" article was also cited as a good example of the desired conversational style for roadmap discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)

### Messaging Challenge: "Linux MDM"

  - [**Problem:** The term "Linux MDM" is a misnomer, as no formal MDM specification exists for Linux.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)
  - [**Dilemma:** Using the term could capture search traffic (\~100/mo) but risks undermining Fleet's authority.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
  - [**Solution:** A nuanced, educational approach.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)
      - [**Method:** Acknowledge the term's informal use ("Kleenex" metaphor) while explaining why a formal Linux MDM doesn't exist.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This strategy captures search intent while establishing Fleet as an expert.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)

### Content Calendar & Workflow

  - [**Tool:** Airtable is the central content database.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Views:**](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
      - [`Ideas to Approve`: For topic feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
      - [`Published Blogs`: For completed content.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
      - [`Ready to Review`: Will be added for content awaiting Brock's approval.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [**Workflow:** Brock will use Airtable's comment feature to provide feedback on topics.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Brock:**](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
      - [Provide a list of \~50 product-led blog topics.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
      - [Share links to technical articles as tone examples.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
      - [Review Airtable topics and add comments.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)
      - [Send Brock direct Slack links to Notion documents needing review.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
      - [Add a `Ready to Review` view to the Airtable calendar.](https://fathom.video/share/7rFgK6CxMxtSY_94XFC8kYnQqnJcLSjD?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
